_comment: Cursor reads MCP servers from one of:
Paste the `mcpServers` block below into one of those files.
Restart Cursor (or toggle the server off/on in Settings → MCP) after editing.
Two variants below: (1) hosted HTTP (mcp.catetus.com — paid, no local Node) and
(2) local stdio via npx (free + optional paid via env). Keep ONE of the two entries.
FREE TIER (stdio, no key): analyze, list_presets, list_scenes, get_scene,
PAID TIER (key set): also encode, score_fidelity, repack, predict_quality,
recommend_preset, batch_jobs, list_jobs. Get a key at https://catetus.com/dashboard.

catetus._comment: Hosted HTTP — paid only. Zero local install. Drop this entry and use the stdio variant below if you want the free tier.

catetus-local-disabled._comment: Alternative: local stdio. Works free without the env block; add CATETUS_API_KEY to unlock paid tier. Rename this key to `catetus` and delete the hosted entry above to use this one.
